title: I Turned Cheap Cloud Storage Into a 1PB Local Drive (With JuiceFS)
summary: JuiceFS is a POSIX-compliant virtual file system that combines cloud object storage like AWS S3 with local NVMe caching through a multi-tiered caching engine. The system separates data from metadata and enables cost-effective scalable storage with local performance characteristics, demonstrated here through AI inference workloads.
